markdown:
#  Update the Employer Identification Number for Your Company's Procore Account 
##  Background 
Using the Company Settings page in the Company level Admin tool, you can add your company's Employer Identification Number.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permission on the Company level Admin tool
  * **Additional Information** :
    * For business entities operating in the United States, the nine (9) digit number assigned to the company is issued by the Internal Revenue Service (IRS)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Company Settings', click **General Settings.**
  3. If you are a business entity operating in the United States, enter the nine (9) digit number assigned to your company by the IRS.
  4. Click **Update**.


## See Also
  * [Configure Administrative Settings: Company Admin](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/configure-administrative-settings-company-admin)
  * [Admin (Company) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/permissions)
  * [Configure Your Company Settings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/configure-your-company-settings)
title: Update the Employer Identification Number for Your Company's Procore Account
description: How to update the Employer Identification Number (EIN) for your company's Procore account.
